description: Restore all vanilla HTML features to the React/Vite app

specs.description: URL fetch populates editor with resolved spec
specs.given: A URL input field is visible below each editor textarea
specs.when: User pastes a URL and clicks Fetch
specs.then: The spec is fetched, parsed, and displayed in the textarea with file size and version shown

specs.description: File drag-drop loads spec into editor
specs.given: The editor textarea is a valid drop zone
specs.when: User drags a .json or .yaml file onto the editor
specs.then: An overlay appears during drag, and the file content populates the textarea on drop

specs.description: Synced scroll keeps both editors aligned
specs.given: Both editors have JSON content loaded
specs.then: The right editor scrolls proportionally to maintain alignment

specs.description: Diff-aware line highlighting shows changed lines in editors
specs.given: A diff has been computed with results showing changed paths
specs.then: Lines in both editors that correspond to changed paths are highlighted with colored backgrounds matching the change type

specs.description: Migration guide renders with timeline, progress, and checklist
specs.given: A diff has been computed and the user clicks Generate guide
specs.then: Shows title, timeline with past/current/future dots, progress bar, severity-colored change cards with checklists

specs.description: Checklist state persists across page reloads
specs.given: User has checked items in the migration checklist
specs.when: The page is reloaded and the same guide is viewed
specs.then: Previously checked items remain checked via localStorage

specs.given: A migration guide is displayed with some checklist items checked
specs.then: A .md file downloads containing title, timeline, all changes with checked/unchecked checklist state

specs.description: Path click in diff table scrolls editors to that line
specs.given: A diff table is displayed and both editors have content
specs.when: User clicks a path segment in the diff table
specs.then: Both editors scroll to the line containing that JSON path

specs.description: Editor info shows file size and spec version
specs.given: An editor has JSON content pasted or loaded
specs.then: Below the editor, file size in KB/MB and extracted version string are displayed

specs.description: Guide nav tab switches to migration guide view
specs.given: A migration guide has been generated
specs.when: User clicks the Guide tab in the header
specs.then: The compare view is hidden and the migration guide section is shown

specs.description: No unsafe HTML injection with external data
specs.given: Any external data such as spec content, URL responses, or file content
specs.when: Data is rendered in the UI
specs.then: React JSX escaping handles all rendering safely per ADR-004

specs.description: Provider sidebar auto-compares on version selection
specs.given: The provider sidebar shows Stripe with version comparisons
specs.then: Both editors populate and diff runs automatically with results displayed
